allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Repos\\planner-v2-scaffold\\public" | ForEach-Object { Move-Item $_.FullName "C:\\Repos\\PlannerV2\\public\\$\($_.Name\)" -Force }; Remove-Item "C:\\Repos\\planner-v2-scaffold\\AGENTS.md" -Force; Remove-Item "C:\\Repos\\planner-v2-scaffold" -Recurse -Force; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Repos\\PlannerV2" -Force | Format-Table Name, Mode -AutoSize)
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { Write-Output "TSC OK" } else { Write-Output "TSC FAILED $LASTEXITCODE" })
PowerShell(npx --yes shadcn@latest add button input label --silent --yes 2>&1)

PowerShell(node -e "console.log\('clsx:', require\('clsx'\).clsx ? 'ok' : 'missing'\); console.log\('tailwind-merge:', require\('tailwind-merge'\).twMerge ? 'ok' : 'missing'\); console.log\('cva:', require\('class-variance-authority'\).cva ? 'ok' : 'missing'\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.scripts,null,2\)\); console.log\('deps:', Object.keys\(p.dependencies||{}\).length, 'devDeps:', Object.keys\(p.devDependencies||{}\).length\)"; "node_modules exists: " + \(Test-Path node_modules\))

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; "nvm:"; Get-Command nvm; "volta:"; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.volta\\bin\\node.exe"; "fnm:"; Get-Command fnm; "winget node list:"; winget list --id OpenJS.NodeJS 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 3; "search C:\\ for node.exe \(top 5\):"; Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\ -Filter node.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 4 | Select-Object -First 5 FullName)

PowerShell($deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(4\); while\(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\){ $m=Get-Process msiexec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\(-not $m\){ "msiexec idle"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10 }; winget install --id OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS -e --silent --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements)

PowerShell($nodeDir = "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs"; if\(-not \(Test-Path "$nodeDir\\node.exe"\)\){ $nodeDir = \(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs','C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs' -Filter node.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).DirectoryName }; "nodeDir=$nodeDir"; $env:Path = "$nodeDir;$env:Path"; node --version; npm --version)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" --yes shadcn@latest add dialog popover dropdown-menu tabs tooltip command sheet separator avatar badge select textarea switch sonner scroll-area --yes --overwrite 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" --yes shadcn@latest add dialog popover dropdown-menu tabs tooltip command sheet separator avatar badge select textarea switch sonner scroll-area --yes --overwrite)
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" --yes shadcn@2.10.0 add dialog --yes --overwrite)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" install tw-animate-css --no-audit --no-fund --save-dev 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "added|error|npm ERR" | Select-Object -First 5)
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; "=== eslint ==="; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" eslint . 2>&1; "eslint exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" tsc --noEmit 2>&1; "tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; "=== eslint ==="; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" eslint . 2>&1; "eslint exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 45)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" tsc --noEmit 2>&1; "tsc: $LASTEXITCODE"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd" eslint . 2>&1; "eslint: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 60)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;$env:Path"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Compiled successfully|Failed|Error|error|✓|✗" | Select-Object -First 20; "build exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
